title: Terracotta Things
description: Add stairs, slabs, walls, pressure plates, and buttons for every terracotta and glazed terracotta.
body:
# Terracotta Things 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
**Terracotta Things** adds functional building block variants for every terracotta and glazed terracotta color in Minecraft — no new textures, no resource pack required. All blocks use vanilla textures seamlessly.

## Blocks

Every one of the **17 terracotta colors** and **16 glazed terracotta colors** gets five new block variants:

  | Block Type      | Terracotta | Glazed Terracotta | Total |
  |-----------------|:----------:|:-----------------:|:-----:|
  | Buttons         | 17         | 16                | 33    |
  | Pressure Plates | 17         | 16                | 33    |
  | Stairs          | 17         | 16                | 33    |
  | Slabs           | 17         | 16                | 33    |
  | Walls           | 17         | 16                | 33    |
  | **Total**       |            |                   | **165** |


## Features

  - **Crafting recipes** — all blocks are craftable using the matching vanilla terracotta as the ingredient, following vanilla crafting patterns
  - **Walls connect** — terracotta walls connect to each other and to all vanilla walls
  - **No resource pack needed** — every block reuses existing vanilla textures
  - **Creative tab** — all 165 blocks are organized in a dedicated **Terracotta Things** tab, grouped by type
